nodes.context: International outlaw motorcycle club founded in Germany in 2003, acts as a support club for the Bandidos.
Major international outlaw motorcycle club, supported by the Chicanos.
Major international outlaw motorcycle club, rival of the Chicanos and Bandidos.
Hells Angels-affiliated motorcycle club that raided the Chicanos' clubhouse in 2009.
German motorcycle club involved in violent conflicts with the Chicanos.
Group comprised partially of former Underdogs members, involved in a shooting with Chicanos.
Swedish gang involved in a conflict with the Chicanos after recruitment attempts.
Motorcycle club whose chapter was patched over to form the first Chicanos branch in Sweden.

edges.context: The Chicanos are a support club (puppet club) for the Bandidos, providing recruits and engaging in criminal activities on their behalf.
Multiple violent incidents including assaults, bomb threats, and car chases between the two clubs in Germany.
Brigade 81 raided the Chicanos' clubhouse in Ludwigsfelde in 2009, leaving several members injured.
Multiple violent clashes including street fights, shootings, and stabbings between the two clubs in Germany.
A member of District 61 shot at two Chicanos members in self-defense in 2013.
Conflict after Chicanos attempted to recruit Black Cobra members, leading to a riot in Trollhättan in 2013.
The first Chicanos branch in Sweden was formed by patching over a No Surrender chapter in Vänersborg in 2012.
